Job Description:

Own your opportunity to shape the future of AI at GDIT
As an AI Engineer supporting the mission of the United States Postal Service (USPS), you will help design, develop, and deploy AI solutions that modernize and optimize essential nationwide operations. Your work will directly contribute to improved efficiency, automated processes, and data‑driven decision making across a high‑impact federal environment.

MEANINGFUL WORK AND PERSONAL IMPACT
As an AI Engineer, you will play a critical role in identifying where AI can streamline business processes and deliver measurable outcomes. You will:

Develop and advance AI capabilities across USPS business functions.
Build tools that automate requirements and test case generation using technologies such as Visual Studio Code, Python, Microsoft Copilot, CrewAI, and other USPS‑approved platforms.
Integrate AI solutions with existing automation frameworks to reduce manual effort and enhance quality.
Evaluate opportunities to embed AI across enterprise workflows and design solutions aligned with mission needs.
Collaborate with cross‑functional teams and communicate technical concepts to both technical and non‑technical stakeholders.
Ensure all AI solutions meet USPS security, compliance, and execution requirements.
Train designated team members to maintain
